feature: Live Social Media Integrations & CloudFront Setup
summary: Comprehensive testing of live integrations for Twitter/X, TikTok, Snapchat, and AWS CloudFront. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all components render correctly with proper status badges, Test buttons, and Connect OAuth buttons.

issues: WebSocket connection closes before established - non-blocking

twitter_integration.test: Twitter test shows connected=true with bearer token

social_platforms_tab.test: Twitter/X card shows Connected + Read Only badges
TikTok card shows Not Connected badge
Snapchat card shows Connected + Read + Write badges
Test buttons present for all platforms

test_results_tab.test: Click Twitter Test button triggers API call

twitter_x_integration.details: Bearer token authenticates successfully. Shows 'Connected' with 'Read Only' badge. OAuth PKCE flow generates valid URL with code_verifier.

tiktok_integration.details: Shows 'Not Connected' as expected (no OAuth token yet). OAuth URL generated correctly pointing to tiktok.com.

snapchat_integration.details: JWT token from env verified. Shows 'Connected' with 'Read + Write' badge.

cloudfront_setup.details: Distribution E2LURX26QTXMXJ already deployed. Domain d3brubd69k8lxz.cloudfront.net. POST setup returns 'already exists'.

navigation.details: Live Integrations accessible via Tools dropdown in navigation bar.

credential_management.details: Credentials can be saved and retrieved (masked). Platform credentials stored in MongoDB.

critical_code_review_comments: All live integration APIs working correctly with real credentials from .env
Twitter bearer token is app-only (read access), OAuth needed for write access
TikTok requires OAuth flow to obtain access token
Snapchat JWT token verified but API permissions may need production mode
CloudFront distribution already created and deployed
seed_data_creation: Test platform credentials saved during credential management test

mocked_api.description: All integrations use real API keys from .env - Twitter Bearer Token, Snapchat JWT, AWS CloudFront

context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Integrations feature fully verified. Backend: 22 API tests pass including Twitter/TikTok/Snapchat/CloudFront endpoints. Frontend: LiveIntegrationsPage renders correctly with proper status badges (Connected/Not Connected, Read Only/Read+Write). CloudFront distribution E2LURX26QTXMXJ deployed with domain d3brubd69k8lxz.cloudfront.net. Twitter shows connected with bearer token (read-only). Snapchat shows connected with JWT (read+write). TikTok requires OAuth (not connected yet). Navigation includes Live Integrations link under Tools dropdown.
